MINI MINUTES: Shelley Buchanan, Esq., appearing for plaintiff. Order to Show Cause to Shelley Buchanan, for failure to file Proof of Service of Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is heard this day. Court ordered OSC to attorney Buchanan off calendar and dissolved. Substitution of Plaintiff in Propria Persona filed on 1/29/2004. Court ordered the Arbitrator's Jurisdiction extended to 6/18/2004.
